articles.title: Tamil Nadu turnout dips to 85.1%; Chennai surges as EC adds 72,000 more votes
articles.description: Tamil Nadu's voting percentage was revised to 85.10%, with Chennai seeing a significant surge to 86.2% after voter additions. The Election Commission confirmed no re-polling is needed across 75,064 stations. Karur district recorded the highest turnout at 92.65%, while Anna Nagar saw the largest increase in Chennai's votes.

articles.title: IDFC First Bank Q4 profit up 5% on lower provisions; fraud hits ops 42%
articles.description: IDFC First Bank reported a modest 5% rise in Q4 net profit, aided by a 40% decline in provisions. However, a Rs 645-crore fraud at its Chandigarh branch sharply dented operating performance, leading to a 42% drop in operating profit after the bank fully expensed the impact during the quarter.

articles.title: Fed FOMC, Q4 earnings and FII action among 9 factors set to steer D-Street this week
articles.description: Markets may remain volatile amid key triggers this week, including the Fed policy decision, Q4 earnings and geopolitical tensions. Technically, Nifty’s near-term bias has turned weak below 23,900, with support at 23,500 and resistance at 24,200–24,500. The rupee logged its steepest weekly fall since September 2022, while Vedanta and Hindustan Zinc will be in focus on key corporate actions.

articles.title: Adani Green to invest Rs 15,000 crore to add 10 GWh battery storage in FY27
articles.description: Adani Green Energy is investing Rs 15,000 crore to add over 10 gigawatt-hours of battery storage this financial year. This move supports India's energy transition by ensuring reliable clean power. The company is building this storage alongside its renewable energy park in Khavda, Gujarat. This expansion aims to provide power during peak demand, making renewable energy available round-the-clock.

articles.title: Peak power demand at record high amid scorching heatwave in India
articles.description: On April 24, India witnessed an extraordinary peak in electricity demand, reaching a staggering 252 GW as extreme heat swept across the country, compelling millions to crank up their air conditioning. This milestone eclipses previous records, and experts predict even more demands as the Indian Meteorological Department warns of a punishing summer ahead.

articles.title: FM Nirmala Sitharaman pushes unified KYC framework, asks Sebi to lead
articles.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman called for a single know-your-customer system across the financial sector. She asked the Securities and Exchange Board of India to lead this initiative. The minister also urged Sebi to focus on future risks. These include artificial intelligence misuse and cyber threats. A strong defense against cyberattacks is crucial for market stability and public trust.
